name: 4 Drawer Stackable Countertop Organizer Clear - Brightroom™: Bathroom & Makeup Organizer, PET Material, 8.02" Height
description:
Arrange your cosmetics and more with this 4-Drawer Stackable Countertop Organizer from Brightroom™ that helps you maintain a neat and tidy space. Boasting a clear plastic construction to make it easy to find your items, this stackable organizer with four drawers offers enough space for your lipstick, makeup brushes and more. This plastic makeup organizer helps keep your cosmetics organized in one spot to make getting ready for the day much more convenient — just add a coordinating round mirror and spinning makeup organizer for a complete vanity setup.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
